folio.label: 199r
folio.l: Co~mendetú it , and seitú in this manere
¢ The palme of martirdom , for to receyue

note.notetxt: 274Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Seynt Cecile , fulfild of goddes ©ifte
The world and eke hire chaumbre , gan she weyue
Wytnesse Tiburces , and Cecilies shrifte
To whicú , god of his bountee wolde shifte
Corones two , of floures wel smellynge
And made his Aungel , he~ the corones brynge

note.notetxt: 280Check the sign against the beginning of the line.ODR

folio.l: ¢ The mayde hatú brougút he~ , to blisse a boue

note.notetxt: 281 Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.Est

folio.l: The world hatú wist , what it is wortú certeyn
Deuociou~ of Chastitee , to loue
Tho shewed hi~ Cecile , al open & pleyn
That alle ydoles , nys but a thyng in veyn

note.notetxt: 285Use of dot over y in ydoles.MP

folio.l: For they ben doumbe , & æä to they ben deeue
And charged hi~ , his ydoles for to leeue
¢ Who so æ trowetú nat this , a beest he is

note.notetxt: 288Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Quod tho Tiburce , if that I shal nat lye
And she gan kisse his breest , that herde this
And was ful glad , he coude trouthe espye
This day , I take the , for myn allye
Seide this blisful , faire mayde deere
And after æ she seide , as ©e moun heere
¢ Lo , rigút so , as the loue of Crist , quod she

note.notetxt: 295Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.ODR

folio.l: Made me thy brothers wyf , rigút in that wyse
A noon for myn allye , heere take I the
Syn æ æè wolt , thyne ydoles despise
Go witú thy brother now , and the baptise
And make the clene , so æ æè mowe byholde
The Aungels face , of whicú thy brother tolde
¢ Tiburce answerde , and seide Brother deere

note.notetxt: 302 Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.Est

folio.l: First telle me , whider æ I shal , & to what man
To whom q¶ he , come fortú w rigút good cheere
I wol the lede , vn to the Pope vrban
To vrban , Brother myn valerian
Quod tho Tiburce , woltow me thider lede
Me thynketú , that it were a wonder dede
¢ Ne menestow nat Vrban , quod he thoo

note.notetxt: 309Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: That is so ofte dampned , to be ded
And wonetú in halkes , alwey to and froo
And dar nat oones , putte fortú his hed
Men shulde hi~ brennen , in a fyr so red
If he were founde , or æ men mygút hi~ spie
